description_long: This object consists of a complex, irregularly shaped, calcified mass with a rough, stone-like texture, accompanied by a flat rectangular panel displaying grayscale medical imaging scans and text. The mass appears to be a 3D-printed or cast model of a cardiac calcified amorphous tumor, with intricate surface details and protrusions. The attached panel features several CT and MRI scan images, as well as an echocardiogram, all labeled with medical terminology. The text on the panel identifies the object as a 'Cardiac Calcified Amorphous Tumor.' The model is mounted on a thin vertical rod, likely for display or educational purposes. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of white, gray, and off-white, giving it a clinical and sterile appearance.
description: A detailed, rough-surfaced calcified tumor model mounted on a rod, accompanied by a labeled medical imaging panel in grayscale.
description_view_0: The calcified mass and the medical imaging panel are both clearly visible, with the text and images on the panel readable.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thinness of the panel and the vertical rod supporting the mass, with less detail visible on the tumor model.
description_view_2: The back of the mass and the panel are visible, with the tumor's rounded surface and the reverse side of the display panel in view.
description_view_3: Another side view, highlighting the irregular, rough structure of the mass and the supporting rod, with the panel edge-on.
attribute_label_text: CT SAG CT COR Cals ECHO CT AXIAL CONTRAST CT SAG CONTRAST CT COR CONTRAST CT AXIAL CONTRAST Cardiac Calcified Amorphous Tumor
